productDisplayName: Titan Men Off White Dial Watch
description: This stylish watch from titan with classic, timeless styling is a must have for every well dressed man. Built with the utmost precision and individuality, each watch has been designed and carefully tested to give you years of reliable service and contemporary style for the man of class! Case diameter: 42 mm Case thickness: 8 mm Dial shape: Round Warranty: 2 Years Stainless steel case with a fixed bezel for durability, style and comfort Black genuine leather strap with a tang clasp Off white dial with metallic hands Date aperture at the 3 hour mark in a circular design Titan logo on the 8 hour mark Screw to reset time Solid case back for enhanced durability Water resistance up to 30 meters, allowing you to use it even when showering or in light rain
